component.name: jterm4
component.summary: Session-aware GTK4 terminal with structured command blocks

description.p: jterm4 defaults to a structured Block terminal that keeps commands, output, exit status, duration, and working directory as searchable history, while retaining a traditional VTE backend for compatibility.

ul.li: Tabs and split panes with safe close checks and session restoration
Structured command blocks, unified search, history, workflows, and executable notebooks
SSH sessions, an asynchronous file tree, and optional multi-provider AI assistance

description.p: Modernized GTK4 architecture, persistence, security, and desktop packaging.
